description: Probabilistic, NON-DIAGNOSTIC cause-contribution report. G3 STRUCTURAL (医師法 §17): schema FORBIDS diagnosis/prescription/treatmentPlan fields (additionalProperties=false at R1). G7 STRUCTURAL: confidence + disclaimer + consultRecommendation are REQUIRED on every report. kizashi senses; mitate diagnoses. Outputs 兆候 + contribution weights with calibrated uncertainty + a recommendation to consult — never an adjudication.

disclaimer.const: 所見は確定原因ではありません。受診を推奨します (This is a sign, not a confirmed cause; please consult a clinician).

symptomDomain.description: The physical-burden domain this report addresses (腰痛/肩こり/鼻詰まり/アレルギー/炎症/etc.)

contributions.description: Probabilistic cause-contribution weights (sum incl. an 'uncertain' residual). Each item names a CANDIDATE CONTRIBUTING FACTOR (e.g. posture-derived, structural-suggestion, circulation), NEVER a disease.

modalityObservationCids.description: Provenance: the modalityObservation CIDs this attribution drew on

confidence.description: G7 REQUIRED: calibrated confidence. 'high' still does not imply a confirmed cause.

consultRecommendation.description: G3/G5: recommendation to consult; 'emergency' triggers triageReferral emergencyFlag

factor.description: candidate contributing factor (non-disease, e.g. posture-derived / structural-suggestion / circulation / uncertain-residual)

weightPermille.description: contribution weight in per-mille (0..1000 = 0..1.0); contributions across one symptomDomain sum to 1000 incl. an uncertain residual
